BatteryMode.description: Represents the target or actual battery power mode.
BatteryMode.raw:
# Represents the target or actual battery power mode.

# Whether the battery is charging.
bool charging

# Whether the battery is used as a power source.
bool draining

BatteryState.description: Represents the state of a single battery.
BatteryState.raw:
# Represents the state of a single battery.

# The current voltage in volts.
float64 voltage

# Estimated state of charge in percents.
float64 state_of_charge

# The target battery mode.
raph_interfaces/BatteryMode target_mode

# The actual battery mode.
raph_interfaces/BatteryMode current_mode

DrivetrainState.description: Represents the state of the drivetrain
DrivetrainState.raw:
# Represents the state of the drivetrain

# Current steering mode.
raph_interfaces/SteeringMode steering_mode

uint8 OPERATING_STATE_DISABLED=0
uint8 OPERATING_STATE_ENABLED=1
uint8 OPERATING_STATE_CALIBRATING_SERVOS=2
uint8 OPERATING_STATE_CHANGING_STEERING_MODE=3

# Current operating state.
uint8 operating_state

# Indicates if the servos are calibrated.
bool is_servos_calibrated

ImuDiagnostics.description: Diagnostic information about IMU sensor running on RaphCore.
ImuDiagnostics.raw:
# Diagnostic information about IMU sensor running on RaphCore.

std_msgs/Header header

# The current temperature of the sensor in degrees Celsius.
float64 temperature

# The current gyroscope biases.
float64 gyro_bias_x
float64 gyro_bias_y
float64 gyro_bias_z

KeyValue.description: Represents an arbitrary key-value pair for arbitrary information.
KeyValue.raw:
# Represents an arbitrary key-value pair for arbitrary information.

string key
string value

Led.description: Represents the position and the state of the LED.
Led.raw:
# Represents the position and the state of the LED.

uint8 PANEL_FRONT=0
uint8 PANEL_REAR=1
uint8 PANEL_LEFT=2
uint8 PANEL_RIGHT=3

# The panel the LED is on.
uint8 panel

# The id of the LED on the panel.
uint8 id

# The state of the LED.
raph_interfaces/LedState state

LedColor.description: This message represents the color of an LED.
LedColor.raw:
# This message represents the color of an LED.

# The intensivity of each color (255 = 100%).
uint8 red
uint8 green
uint8 blue
uint8 white

LedPanelState.description: Represents the state of the whole LED panel.
LedPanelState.raw:
# Represents the state of the whole LED panel.

uint8 PANEL_FRONT=0
uint8 PANEL_REAR=1
uint8 PANEL_LEFT=2
uint8 PANEL_RIGHT=3

# Which LED panel does this state applies to.
uint8 panel

# State of each LED on the panel.
# The largest panel has 40 LEDs. If the length of the array is smaller than the number of LEDs on
# the panel, the remaining LEDs are not changed. If the length is greater than the number of LEDs
# on the panel, the extra states are ignored.
raph_interfaces/LedState[<=40] state

LedState.description: This message represents the state of a single LED.
LedState.raw:
# This message represents the state of a single LED.

# The duration (in ms) the state should be active.
# Setting it to 0 will make the state active indefinitely.
uint16 duration

# The priority of the state.
# If the value is equal to 0 or is lower than the priority of the current user LED, the state is ignored.
# The value of -1 resets the user state of the LED.
int8 priority

# The color of the LED
raph_interfaces/LedColor color

LedStripState.description: This message represents the state of the whole led strip.
LedStripState.raw:
# This message represents the state of the whole led strip.

uint8 LED_STRIP_SIZE=143

raph_interfaces/LedState[143] state

MotorDiagnostics.description: Diagnostic information about motors controlled by RaphCore.
MotorDiagnostics.raw:
# Diagnostic information about motors controlled by RaphCore.
#
# The order of the motors is:
#   - rear left wheel
#   - rear right wheel
#   - right servo
#   - left servo
#   - front left wheel
#   - front right wheel

std_msgs/Header header

# The current temperature in degrees Celsius.
uint8[6] temperature

# The current power output in watts.
float64[6] power

# The energy consumed in watt-hours since the robot was powered on.
float64[6] energy

uint8 FAULT_BIT_SENSOR_FAULT=1
uint8 FAULT_BIT_BUS_OVERCURRENT=2
uint8 FAULT_BIT_PHASE_OVERCURRENT=4
uint8 FAULT_BIT_STALL=8
uint8 FAULT_BIT_OVERHEAT=16

# The current fault mask reported by the motor.
uint8[6] fault_mask_active

# Mask of all fault that occurred since the robot was powered on.
uint8[6] fault_mask_occurred

PowerSystemState.description: Represents the state of the Power System.
PowerSystemState.raw:
# Represents the state of the Power System.

std_msgs/Header header

# Whether the charger is connected.
bool charger_connected

# Whether the batteries are connected.
bool bat1_connected
bool bat2_connected

# The states of the batteries, not valid for unconnected batteries.
raph_interfaces/BatteryState bat1_state
raph_interfaces/BatteryState bat2_state

# The current power output in watts.
float64 power

# The energy consumed in watt-hours since the robot was powered on.
float64 energy

ServoCommand.description: This message defines an interface of steering a single servo
ServoCommand.raw:
# This message defines an interface of steering a single servo

# Defines whether the motor is enabled or disabled (loose)
bool enabled

# Servo target position in rad
float64 target_position

# Target velocity of the servo in rad/s.
# If set to 0 will use the value of drivetrain.servo.position_loop_speed parameter
float64 target_velocity

# The divider for the maximum acceleration of the servos (10000 rpm/s^2)
# E.g. 1 = 10000 rpm/s^2, 2 = 5000 rpm/s^2, 4 = 2500 rpm/s^2 etc.
# If set to 0 will use the value of drivetrain.servo.acceleration_divider parameter
uint8 acceleration_divider

SteeringMode.description: This message represents the steering mode used by the drivetrain controller.
SteeringMode.raw:
# This message represents the steering mode used by the drivetrain controller.

uint8 ACKERMANN=0
uint8 TURN_IN_PLACE=1

uint8 data

TurnInPlaceDrive.description: This message defines a command to turn the robot in place.
TurnInPlaceDrive.raw:
# This message defines a command to turn the robot in place.

float64 angular_velocity
float64 acceleration

WheelCommand.description: This message defines an interface of steering a single wheel
WheelCommand.raw:
# This message defines an interface of steering a single wheel

# Defines whether the motor is enabled or disabled (loose)
bool enabled

# Target velocity of the wheel in rad/s.
float64 target_velocity

# The divider for the maximum acceleration of the wheels (10000 rpm/s^2)
# E.g. 1 = 10000 rpm/s^2, 2 = 5000 rpm/s^2, 4 = 2500 rpm/s^2 etc.
# If set to 0 will use the value of drivetrain.wheel.acceleration_divider parameter
uint8 acceleration_divider

GetControllerInfo.raw:
---
# The version of the bootloader.
string bootloader_version

# The version of the firmware.
string firmware_version

# Additional information about the controller in the form of key-value pairs.
# Can be used to provide any additional information about the controller in future versions of the
# firmware without changing the service definition.
raph_interfaces/KeyValue[] extra_information

GetOsVersion.raw:
---
# version string in the format {major}.{minor}.{patch}
string version

# Optional version variant
string variant

# Parsed version numbers
uint8 major
uint8 minor
uint8 patch

SetBatteryModes.raw:
raph_interfaces/BatteryMode bat1_mode
raph_interfaces/BatteryMode bat2_mode
---
bool success
string status_message

SetLeds.raw:
raph_interfaces/Led[<=143] leds
---
bool success
string status_message

SetSteeringMode.raw:
raph_interfaces/SteeringMode steering_mode
---
bool success
string status_message
